dialogos.texto_en: So, what should we do?\nToday is a free day,\nso let's go wherever you want, Itsuki.
How about we go to a place that interests you,\nUesugi-kun?
Is that so?\nHmm...
I'm interested in historical sites like castles,\nbut Okinawa is so big.\nIt might be tough to go there right now.
A castle, you say?
There's a place\nwhere the castle walls have been restored.\nLike Nakagusuku Castle.
Ah, well, how about we stop by there on the last day,\non our way to Okinawa World?
Ah, that's right.\nWell then...
...Oh, no.\nThere are too many options to choose from.
Okinawa has so many attractive places\nthat it's difficult to decide.
Come to think of it, tomorrow's plan\nwas to go to Ocean Expo Park,\nand then head to American Village.
American Village, that's a shopping mall, right?
Yes, there are buildings that are designed\nwith an American style.\nIt's a good place to take our time.
Okay, let's go there then.
Yes, let's do that.\nWe don't want to waste time thinking too much.
I deeply feel that we're not good at spontaneity.
Haha, that's for sure.\nI'm also the type to plan out my travels precisely.\nI can't decide intuitively like this.
Is this also our way of doing things?
Let's go with that for now.\nRight, let's head to American Village.
Okay.
